plot outline: Oakland A's GM Billy Beane is handicapped with the lowest salary constraint in baseball. If he ever wants to win the World Series, Billy must find a competitive advantage. Billy is about to turn baseball on its ear when he uses statistical data to analyze and place value on the players he picks for the team.
title: Moneyball

distributors.name: Columbia TriStar Warner Filmes de Portugal
Walt Disney Studios Sony Pictures Releasing (WDSSPR)
